title: Chicken Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful Indian-inspired chicken stew made with tender chunks of chicken and a rich, aromatic spice blend.

ingredients.name: Boneless, skinless chicken breast or thighs

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until lightly browned, about 8 minutes.
Add the ginger and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook, stirring occasionally, until browned on all sides and cooked through, about 6-8 minutes.
Add the bouillon cubes, stew, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the flavors have melded together and the chicken is tender, about 20-25 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
